# CWE-343 safe: Predictable Value Range from Previous Values (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-343-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/binary"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

func DrawDoorPrize(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	participant := r.URL.Query().Get("participant")
	if participant == "" {
		http.Error(w, "participant required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	var n uint32
	if err := binary.Read(rand.Reader, binary.BigEndian, &n); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	fmt.Fprintf(w, "%d", n%101)
	return nil
}
